package rulecoverage

func NegativeGoPerfLayerErrorHandlingCostMultierrorAppendForSuccessPath() string {
    ruleID := "go_perf_layer_error_handling_cost_multierror_append_for_success_path"
    family := "performance"
    severity := "contextual"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "Layer: Error handling cost. Flag multi-error aggregators allocated on success-heavy paths before any error exists."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
